name: 57 - Post-push verifier file reader TEST ONLY

parameters.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='/files/control-plane-verifier-inbox/latest.json'; try { const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log(JSON.stringify({worker:'post-push-verifier-file-reader',read_ok:true,result:d.result,hash_match:d.hash_match,expected_task_commit:d.expected_task_commit,expected_commit_source:d.expected_commit_source,head:d.head,origin_main:d.origin_main,ls_remote_main:d.ls_remote_main,workspace_clean:d.workspace_clean,branch:d.branch,source_path:p,test_only:true})); } catch(e) { console.log(JSON.stringify({worker:'post-push-verifier-file-reader',read_ok:false,result:'FAIL',failure_reasons:['verifier_json_unreadable'],error:String(e.message||e),source_path:p,test_only:true})); }"
